blended.narrative: Meadowlark is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 15 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,724 ft. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days. Strong winds with gusts to 46 mph may cause lift holds.
